title: Mildly Roasted Canadian Chicken Casserole
description: A comforting, silky casserole featuring roasted chicken, thyme, and a wood-fired bake, perfect for a sick day, with anti-inflammatory friendly ingredients.

ingredients.name: canned condensed cream of chicken soup

instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, thyme, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the oil and spice mixture.
Spread the chicken mixture in a 9x13 inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the cream of chicken soup and milk until smooth.
Pour the soup mixture over the chicken in the baking dish.
Top with the thawed mixed vegetables.
Bake for 35 minutes, then reduce the oven temperature to 325 degrees Fahrenheit and continue baking for an additional 20 minutes.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before serving.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
